g.text: TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION: JUMP VALIDATION STATE MACHINE (VM-M3-007)

ol.li: Alignment: Target must be start of opcode.
VM Context: Error must log current IP.

p.code: [line 12] Runtime Error: Jump target 0x%04X exceeds bytecode capacity 0x%04X.

ul.li: Stack is preserved for debugger trace.
Blue Node: Memory I/O Phase (Bus access)
Red Node: Terminal Fault State (Immediate exit)
